headline: GTA 6 window confirmed: TTWO +5.6% leads; semis extend — MRVL +12.4%, INTC +11.7%; QQQ +2.35%

market_state.line: SPY +0.99%, QQQ +2.35%, VXX stress 0.93 — semis ripping, tape strong; hawkish Warsh repricing is the lurking headwind for high-multiple name

actions.line: GTA 6 window catalyst +5.6%; stretched 5d but real news justifies quarter-size long.
Signal + risk green, research neutral no veto; clean technical setup at half size.

watch.line: MRVL +12.4% relv 1.17 — semi momentum extending from yesterday's Iran-deal rip; watch for continuation or exhaustion.
GTA 6 window boosts Xbox/Game Pass attach and Microsoft Store cut — bullish ripple, medium confidence, not priced.
GTA 6 calendar crowding risk — bearish ripple for AAA competitor; Battlefield/sports titles may need to move, pressuring FY timing.
Physical preorder + collector-edition traffic rare positive for brick-and-mortar retail; medium confidence.
TNGX -12.6% relv 1.64 — notable flush on elevated volume; monitor for stabilization catalyst.

changed: Desk drops INTC & VRT; new takes are TTWO (quarter, GTA 6 catalyst) and RVMD (half, technical)
Semi leadership shifts from INTC/VRT to MRVL (+12.4%) and SNDK (+11.7%) as Iran-deal momentum extends
GTA 6 confirmation replaces geopolitics as the dominant single-stock catalyst
caveats: RTH scan as of 14:28 ET 2026-06-18; prices stale by seconds to minutes — verify quotes before entry.
Hawkish Warsh repricing is a live macro risk: higher-for-longer rates compress long-duration multiples and could cap upside on TTWO and RVMD if sentiment shifts intraday.
